caption: A woman with dark hair and glasses stands against a solid dark gray background. She wears a light green, embroidered tunic with a dark necklace and a small clip-on microphone attached to her neckline. Throughout the sequence, she is speaking and gesturing with her hands to emphasize her points. In the beginning, her right hand is raised and open, while in later moments, she lowers her hands and opens her mouth wider as she continues to talk. A small circular logo containing the text "NPTEL" is visible in the bottom left corner of each shot. The camera remains stationary in a medium close-up shot, focusing on her upper body and facial expressions as she delivers her presentation.
